spec:
# Component Specification: Bookmark List Screen (`/`)

**QuickMarks — Screen 1 (Home)**
**Version:** 1.0 | **Type:** Planning Specification

---

## 1. Component Tree

```
BookmarkListScreen
├── PageLayout
│   ├── FilterBar [sticky, header landmark]
│   │   ├── SearchBar
│   │   │   ├── SearchIcon (decorative)
│   │   │   ├── SearchInput
│   │   │   ├── ClearButton (conditional: visible when input non-empty)
│   │   │   └── SearchLiveRegion (visually hidden, aria-live="polite")
│   │   └── TagFilterRow [role="group", aria-label="Filter by tag"]
│   │       ├── AllChip (pinned, non-scrolling)
│   │       └── TagChipScrollArea [overflow-x: auto]
│   │           ├── TagChip × N [role="checkbox"]
│   │           └── ScrollFadeOverlay (right-edge gradient, decorative)
│   │
│   ├── ContentArea [main landmark]
│   │   ├── [STATE A] BookmarkCardGrid (has items, filters match)
│   │   │   ├── ResultCountLabel (optional, "Showing N of M")
│   │   │   └── BookmarkCard × N [role="article"]
│   │   │       ├── CardFront (default state)
│   │   │       │   ├── CardTitle
│   │   │       │   ├── CardURL
│   │   │       │   ├── CardTagList
│   │   │       │   │   ├── CardTagChip × (max 3)
│   │   │       │   │   └── TagOverflowChip ("+N", conditional)
│   │   │       │   ├── CardTimestamp
│   │   │       │   └── CardActions (hover-revealed desktop / always visible mobile)
│   │   │       │       ├── EditButton → /edit/:id
│   │   │       │       └── DeleteButton (triggers CardFlip)
│   │   │       └── CardBack (delete confirmation state)
│   │   │           ├── ConfirmationMessage [aria-live="assertive", role="group"]
│   │   │           ├── CancelButton (receives focus on flip)
│   │   │           ├── ConfirmDeleteButton
│   │   │           └── AutoRevertIndicator (optional countdown)
│   │   │
│   │   ├── [STATE B] EmptyState (store is empty)
│   │   │   ├── EmptyIllustration
│   │   │   ├── EmptyHeading ("No bookmarks yet")
│   │   │   ├── EmptySubtext ("Save your first link")
│   │   │   └── EmptyCTAButton → /add [aria-label="Save your first bookmark"]
│   │   │
│   │   └── [STATE C] NoResultsState (store has items, filters yield 0)
│   │       ├── NoResultsMessage ("No bookmarks match your filters")
│   │       └── ClearFiltersButton (resets search + all tag chips)
│   │
│   └── FAB (Floating Action Button) [fixed, bottom-right]
│       └── PlusIcon [aria-label="Add new bookmark"]
│
└── [Global] ToastRegion (future / reserved slot)
```

---

## 2. Layout Rules

### 2.1 PageLayout

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  FilterBar (sticky, z-index: sticky / 1100)  │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │  SearchBar                             │  │
│  │  ─────────────────────────────────     │  │
│  │  [All] [tag1] [tag2] [tag3] → →  ░░░  │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│  ContentArea (scrollable)                    │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │  [Card] [Card] [Card]                  │  │
│  │  [Card] [Card] [Card]                  │  │
│  │       …                                │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│                                    [FAB]      │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

- **Page background:** `background-primary` (`ink-0` / `#F8F9FB`)
- **Max content width:** `1280px`, centred with `auto` horizontal margins
- **Page margin:** `24px` left/right (desktop/tablet); `16px` (mobile)
- **FilterBar** is `position: sticky; top: 0;` with `z-index: 1100` (`z_index.sticky`)
- **ContentArea** occupies remaining viewport height, `overflow-y: auto`
- **FAB** is `position: fixed; bottom: 24px; right: 24px;` (desktop/tablet); `bottom: 16px; right: 16px;` (mobile)
- **ContentArea bottom padding:** `80px` on mobile to prevent FAB overlap with last card actions

---

### 2.2 FilterBar

```
Desktop/Tablet (≥ 768px):
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  [🔍 Search bookmarks...              ×]          │
│  [All] ─── scrollable ──── [tag1][tag2][tag3] ░░ │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Mobile (< 768px):
┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  [🔍 Search bookmarks...          ×]     │
│  ─────────────────────────────────────── │
│  [All] [tag1][tag2][tag3][tag4]→→→  ░░░ │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

- **Background:** `surface-primary` (`white`) with `elevation.level 1` shadow applied on scroll (adds depth separation)
- **Padding:** `16px` vertical, `24px` horizontal (desktop); `12px` vertical, `16px` horizontal (mobile)
- **Gap between SearchBar and TagFilterRow:** `12px` (spacing scale `12`)
- **FilterBar total height (approx):** 96–112px depending on chip row height

#### SearchBar

- **Width:** `100%` of FilterBar content width
- **Height:** minimum `44px` (`touch_targets.minimum_height`)
- **Background:** `surface-input` (`white`)
- **Border:** `1px solid border-default` (`ink-100`); focus state: `2px solid border-focus` (`indigo-500`), `focus_ring.offset: 2px`
- **Border radius:** `medium` (`12px`)
- **Padding:** `12px 16px` (with icon offset left `40px`, clear button offset right `36px`)
- **Internal layout:** `flex`, `align-items: center`; SearchIcon left-aligned, ClearButton right-aligned
- **SearchIcon:** `16px`, `text-disabled` colour (`ink-300`)
- **ClearButton:** `24×24px` touch target minimum padded to `44px`, `text-secondary` (`ink-600`)
- **Input text:** `body` role — `14px / 400`, `text-primary` (`ink-950`)
- **Placeholder text:** `ink-300`, `body` role

#### TagFilterRow

- **Layout:** `flex`, `flex-wrap: nowrap`, `overflow-x: auto`, `scrollbar-width: none` (hide native scrollbar)
- **AllChip:** `flex-shrink: 0`, positioned before scroll area; consider CSS split with `position: sticky; left: 0` or a separate non-scrolling container
- **Gap between chips:** `8px` (spacing unit)
- **ScrollFadeOverlay:** `position: absolute; right: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 48px;` using a gradient from `transparent` → `surface-primary` / `white`; `pointer-events: none`; `z-index` above chips
- **Row height:** `44px` (chips min touch target)

#### TagChip Variants

| State | Background | Border | Text Colour | Token Reference |
|-------|-----------|--------|-------------|-----------------|
| Inactive | `ink-50` (`#EEF1F5`) | `1px solid ink-100` | `ink-600` | `border-default`, `text-secondary` |
| Active / Checked | `indigo-500` | none | `white` | `cta-primary`, `text-on-cta` |
| Hover (inactive) | `ink-100` overlay at `0.08` opacity | — | — | `state.hover_opacity` |
| Hover (active) | `indigo-600` | none | `white` | `cta-hover` |
| "All" (no active filters) | `ink-50` | `1px solid ink-100` | `ink-600` | same as inactive |
| "All" (filters active) | `indigo-500` | none | `white` | same as active |

- **Chip height:** `32px`; **padding:** `0 12px`
- **Border radius:** `pill` (`9999px`)
- **Typography:** `label` — `12px / 500`
- **Transition:** `fast` (`100ms`) `ease-out` on background/border/colour
- **Focus ring:** `2px solid indigo-500`, `offset: 2px`
- **Reduced motion:** no transition, immediate state change

---

### 2.3 BookmarkCardGrid

- **Layout:** CSS Grid
- **Column rules by breakpoint** (see §4 for full breakpoint table):
  - Mobile `< 768px`: `1` column
  - Tablet `768–1023px`: `2` columns
  - Desktop `≥ 1024px`: `3` columns
- **Gutter:** `24px` (desktop/tablet); `16px` (mobile)
- **Row gap:** `24px` (desktop/tablet); `16px` (mobile)
- **Top padding:** `24px` below FilterBar; **bottom padding:** `80px` (mobile), `48px` (desktop/tablet) to clear FAB

---

### 2.4 BookmarkCard

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  [Title — 14px/500, single line]   [✎🗑]│ ← actions: hover-desktop / always-mobile
│  [url.com — 12px/500, muted]           │
│  ─────────────────────────────────────  │
│  [tag1] [tag2] [+1]       · 2h ago     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

- **Background:** `surface-primary` (`white`)
- **Border radius:** `medium` (`12px`)
- **Border:** `1px solid border-default` (`ink-100`) — optional, assists separation on light bg
- **Padding:** `16px`
- **Elevation at rest:** `level 1` shadow
- **Elevation on hover/focus:** `level 2` shadow; transition `normal` (`200ms`) `ease-out`
- **Reduced motion:** no shadow transition

**CardTitle**
- Typography: `14px / 500` (body with weight override)
- Colour: `text-primary` (`ink-950`)
- Overflow: `text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden;` — 60 char visual limit via CSS
- Max width: `100%`

**CardURL**
- Typography: `label` — `12px / 500`
- Colour: `text-secondary` (`ink-600`)
- Overflow: same ellipsis pattern, single line
- Margin top: `4px`

**CardTagList**
- Layout: `flex; flex-wrap: nowrap; gap: 4px; overflow: hidden;`
- Max 3 `CardTagChip` components visible
- **CardTagChip:** background `ink-50`, border `1px solid ink-100`, text `ink-600`, `label` (`12px/400`), height `20px`, padding `0 6px`, border-radius `pill`
- **TagOverflowChip:** same visual as CardTagChip, text `+N`, `text-secondary`; hover tooltip shows all tag names
- Margin top: `12px`

**CardTimestamp**
- Typography: `small` — `11px / 400`
- Colour: `text-disabled` (`ink-300`)
- Positioned inline after tags or below on narrow cards; float right or `margin-left: auto` via flex

**CardActions**
- **Desktop:** `position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px;` — `opacity: 0` at rest, `opacity: 1` on card hover/focus; transition `normal` (`200ms`) `ease-out`
- **Mobile/Tablet:** rendered below card content as a persistent flex row, `justify-content: flex-end`, `gap: 8px`, `padding-top: 8px`
- Each action button: `44×44px` touch target, icon centred within, `border-radius: small` (`8px`)
- **EditButton:** icon `16px`, colour `text-secondary` (`ink-600`); hover: `cta-primary` (`indigo-500`)
- **DeleteButton:** icon `16px`, colour `text-secondary` (`ink-600`); hover: `error` (`red-500`)

**CardBack (Delete Confirmation)**
- **Trigger:** DeleteButton click
- **Animation:** 200ms crossfade (opacity transition) between CardFront and CardBack; `prefers-reduced-motion` → instant swap, no animation
- **Layout:** Same card dimensions; `flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 16px;`
- **ConfirmationMessage:** `body` — `14px / 400`, `text-primary`, centred
- **CancelButton:** secondary/outlined style; receives `focus` immediately on flip; keyboard `Escape` triggers cancel
- **ConfirmDeleteButton:** `background: red-500`, `text-on-cta` (`white`)
- **Focus trap:** Tab cycles only between CancelButton and ConfirmDeleteButton while card is flipped
- **Auto-revert:** 5 seconds; optional visual countdown on card border (e.g., `border-color: ink-100` progress animation)
- **ARIA:** `role="group"`, `aria-live="assertive"` on ConfirmationMessage container

---

### 2.5 EmptyState

- **Layout:** `flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;` centred in ContentArea
- **Minimum height of ContentArea:** `calc(100vh - FilterBarHeight)` to allow vertical centring
- **Vertical padding:** `64px` top and bottom
- **EmptyIllustration:** line-art SVG; `ink-100` strokes, `indigo-500` accent; max-width `240px`; spacing below `32px`
- **EmptyHeading:** `heading-2` — `24px / 700`, `text-primary`, `text-align: center`; margin bottom `8px`
- **EmptySubtext:** `body` — `14px / 400`, `text-secondary`, `text-align: center`; margin bottom `24px`
- **EmptyCTAButton:** `background: cta-primary` (`indigo-500`), `text-on-cta` (`white`), `border-radius: medium` (`12px`), height `44px`, padding `0 24px`, `label` typography (`12px/500`); hover: `cta-hover` (`indigo-600`)

---

### 2.6 NoResultsState

- **Layout:** same centring as EmptyState; `flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 16px;`
- **Vertical padding:** `64px` top and bottom
- **NoResultsMessage:** `body` — `14px / 400`, `text-secondary`, `text-align: center`
- **ClearFiltersButton:** text-only button; colour `cta-primary` (`indigo-500`); no background; underline on hover; `label` typography (`12px/500`); minimum `44px` touch target via padding
- **No illustration** — intentional; data exists, state is filter-induced

---

### 2.7 FAB

- **Size:** `56×56px` (`border-radius: pill / 9999px`)
- **Minimum touch target:** `44×44px` (satisfied by 56px)
- **Background:** `cta-primary` (`indigo-500`)
- **Icon:** `+` (plus), `24px`, `text-on-cta` (`white`)
- **Elevation:** `level 3` shadow
- **Position:** `position: fixed; bottom: 24px; right: 24px;` (desktop/tablet); `bottom: 16px; right: 16px;` (mobile)
- **z-index:** `1100` (sticky layer — sits above card grid, below modals)
- **Hover state:** background `cta-hover` (`indigo-600`); transition `normal` (`200ms`) `ease-out`
- **Focus ring:** `2px solid indigo-500; outline-offset: 2px`
- **ARIA:** `aria-label="Add new bookmark"`; navigates to `/add`

---

## 3. Token Bindings

### 3.1 Colour Token Bindings

| Component / Element | Token Name | Resolved Value |
|--------------------|-----------|----------------|
| Page background | `background-primary` → `ink-0` | `#F8F9FB` |
| Card background | `surface-primary` → `white` | `#FFFFFF` |
| FilterBar background | `surface-primary` → `white` | `#FFFFFF` |
| Card border | `border-default` → `ink-100` | `#D6DBE3` |
| SearchBar border (rest) | `border-default` → `ink-100` | `#D6DBE3` |
| SearchBar border (focus) | `border-focus` → `indigo-500` | `#4F6AFF` |
| SearchBar input text | `text-primary` → `ink-950` | `#0D0F12` |
| SearchBar placeholder | `text-disabled` → `ink-300` | `#8C95A3` |
| SearchIcon colour | `text-disabled` → `ink-300` | `#8C95A3` |
| CardTitle | `text-primary` → `ink-950` | `#0D0F12` |
| CardURL | `text-secondary` → `ink-600` | `#3A414D` |
| CardTimestamp | `text-disabled` → `ink-300` | `#8C95A3` |
| CardTag chip background | `surface-secondary` → `ink-50` | `#EEF1F5` |
| CardTag chip border | `border-default` → `ink-100` | `#D6DBE3` |
| CardTag chip text | `text-secondary` → `ink-600` | `#3A414D` |
| TagChip inactive background | `surface-secondary` → `ink-50` | `#EEF1F5` |
| TagChip inactive border | `border-default` → `ink-100` | `#D6DBE3` |
| TagChip inactive text | `text-secondary` → `ink-600` | `#3A414D` |
| TagChip active background | `cta-primary` → `indigo-500` | `#4F6AFF` |
| TagChip active text | `text-on-cta` → `white` | `#FFFFFF` |
| TagChip active hover | `cta-hover` → `indigo-600` | `#3A54E8` |
| EditButton icon (rest) | `text-secondary` → `ink-600` | `#3A414D` |
| EditButton icon (hover) | `cta-primary` → `indigo-500` | `#4F6AFF` |
| DeleteButton icon (rest) | `text-secondary` → `ink-600` | `#3A414D` |
| DeleteButton icon (hover) | `error` → `red-500` | `#E53E3E` |
| ConfirmDeleteButton bg | `error` → `red-500` | `#E53E3E` |
| ConfirmDeleteButton text | `text-on-cta` → `white` | `#FFFFFF` |
| FAB background | `cta-primary` → `indigo-500` | `#4F6AFF` |
| FAB icon | `text-on-cta` → `white` | `#FFFFFF` |
| FAB hover background | `cta-hover` → `indigo-600` | `#3A54E8` |
| EmptyCTAButton background | `cta-primary` → `indigo-500` | `#4F6AFF` |
| EmptyCTAButton hover | `cta-hover` → `indigo-600` | `#3A54E8` |
| EmptyCTAButton text | `text-on-cta` → `white` | `#FFFFFF` |
| ClearFiltersButton text | `cta-primary` → `indigo-500` | `#4F6AFF` |
| EmptyIllustration stroke | `border-default` → `ink-100` | `#D6DBE3` |
| EmptyIllustration accent | `cta-primary` → `indigo-500` | `#4F6AFF` |
| Focus ring colour | `border-focus` → `indigo-500` | `#4F6AFF` |
| Scroll fade gradient start | `surface-primary` → `white` | `#FFFFFF` |
| Scroll fade gradient end | `transparent` | `transparent` |

### 3.2 Typography Token Bindings

| Element | Token Role | Size | Weight | Line Height |
|---------|-----------|------|--------|-------------|
| SearchInput text | `body` | `14px` | `400` | `1.5` |
| SearchInput placeholder | `body` | `14px` | `400` | `1.5` |
| TagChip label | `label` | `12px` | `500` | `1.4` |
| CardTitle | `body` (weight override `500`) | `14px` | `500` | `1.5` |
| CardURL | `label` | `12px` | `500` | `1.4` |
| CardTagChip text | `small` | `11px` | `400` | `1.4` |
| CardTimestamp | `small` | `11px` | `400` | `1.4` |
| EmptyHeading | `heading-2` | `24px` | `700` | `1.25` |
| EmptySubtext | `body` | `14px` | `400` | `1.5` |
| NoResultsMessage | `body` | `14px` | `400` | `1.5` |
| ClearFiltersButton | `label` | `12px` | `500` | `1.4` |
| ConfirmationMessage | `body` | `14px` | `400` | `1.5` |
| EmptyCTAButton | `label` | `12px` | `500` | `1.4` |
| FAB icon label (sr-only) | `label` | `12px` | `500` | `1.4` |

### 3.3 Spacing Token Bindings

| Usage | Token Value | Resolved px |
|-------|------------|-------------|
| Page horizontal margin (desktop) | `spacing[5]` | `24px` |
| Page horizontal margin (mobile) | `spacing[4]` | `16px` |
| Card grid gutter (desktop) | `spacing[5]` | `24px` |
| Card grid gutter (mobile) | `spacing[4]` | `16px` |
| Card internal padding | `spacing[4]` | `16px` |
| FilterBar vertical padding (desktop) | `spacing[4]` | `16px` |
| FilterBar vertical padding (mobile) | `spacing[3]` | `12px` |
| Gap: SearchBar → TagFilterRow | `spacing[3]` | `12px` |
| Gap between tag chips | `spacing[2]` | `8px` |
| Gap between card tag chips | `spacing[1]` | `4px` |
| CardTitle → CardURL margin | `spacing[1]` | `4px` |
| CardURL → TagList margin | `spacing[3]` | `12px` |
| CardActions internal gap | `spacing[2]` | `8px` |
| FAB offset bottom (desktop) | `spacing[5]` | `24px` |
| FAB offset right (desktop) | `spacing[5]` | `24px` |
| FAB offset bottom (mobile) | `spacing[4]` | `16px` |
| FAB offset right (mobile) | `spacing[4]` | `16px` |
| ContentArea bottom padding (mobile) | `80px` | manual override |
| ContentArea bottom padding (desktop) | `spacing[6]` | `48px` |
| EmptyState vertical padding | `spacing[8]` | `64px` |
| EmptyState illustration margin-bottom | `spacing[6]` | `32px` |
| EmptyHeading margin-bottom | `spacing[2]` | `8px` |
| EmptySubtext margin-bottom | `spacing[5]` | `24px` |

### 3.4 Elevation Token Bindings

| Element | Elevation Level | Shadow Value |
|---------|----------------|--------------|
| Card at rest | `level 1` | `0 1px 3px rgba(13,15,18,0.08), 0 1px 2px rgba(13,15,18,0.06)` |
| Card on hover/focus | `level 2` | `0 4px 12px rgba(13,15,18,0.10), 0 2px 4px rgba(13,15,18,0.06)` |
| FilterBar on scroll | `level 1` | same as card at rest |
| FAB | `level 3` | `0 12px 32px rgba(13,15,18,0.14), 0 4px 8px rgba(13,15,18,0.08)` |
| Tag chips | `level 0` | `none` |

### 3.5 Border Radius Token Bindings

| Element | Token | Resolved Value |
|---------|-------|----------------|
| SearchBar | `radius.medium` | `12px` |
| BookmarkCard | `radius.medium` | `12px` |
| TagChip (filter row) | `radius.pill` | `9999px` |
| CardTagChip | `radius.pill` | `9999px` |
| TagOverflowChip | `radius.pill` | `9999px` |
| EmptyCTAButton | `radius.medium` | `12px` |
| FAB | `radius.pill` | `9999px` |
| Action buttons | `radius.small` | `8px` |
| CancelButton | `radius.small` | `8px` |
| ConfirmDeleteButton | `radius.small` | `8px` |

### 3.6 Motion Token Bindings

| Interaction | Duration Token | Resolved | Easing |
|------------|---------------|----------|--------|
| TagChip toggle (bg/colour) | `fast` | `100ms` | `ease-out` |
| Card hover elevation | `normal` | `200ms` | `ease-out` |
| CardActions opacity reveal | `normal` | `200ms` | `ease-out` |
| CardFront ↔ CardBack crossfade | `normal` | `200ms` | `ease-out` |
| Card delete collapse/fade-out | `normal` | `200ms` | `ease-out` |
| FAB appearance | `normal` | `200ms` | `cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1)` (emphasized) |
| SearchBar focus ring | `fast` | `100ms` | `ease-out` |
| **Reduced motion override** | All transitions | `0ms` / instant | N/A |

### 3.7 Z-Index Token Bindings

| Element | Token | Resolved Value |
|---------|-------|----------------|
| FilterBar (sticky) | `z_index.sticky` | `1100` |
| FAB | `z_index.sticky` | `1100` |
| TagChip ScrollFadeOverlay | inline `1` (above chips) | manual |
| CardBack confirmation | inline `2` (above CardFront) | manual |
| Tag overflow tooltip | `z_index.tooltip` | `1400` |

---

## 4. Responsive Breakpoints

### 4.1 Breakpoint Definitions

| Name | Token | Min Width | Max Width |
|------|-------|-----------|-----------|
| Mobile | `breakpoints.mobile` | `0px` | `767px` |
| Tablet | `breakpoints.tablet` | `768px` | `1023px` |
| Desktop | `breakpoints.desktop` | `1024px` | `1439px` |
| Wide | `breakpoints.wide` | `1440px` | `∞` |

---

### 4.2 Breakpoint Behaviour Matrix

| Property | Mobile (`< 768px`) | Tablet (`768–1023px`) | Desktop (`≥ 1024px`) | Wide (`≥ 1440px`) |
|----------|-------------------|----------------------|---------------------|-------------------|
| Card grid columns | `1` | `2` | `3` | `3` (max-width caps at 1280px) |
| Grid gutter | `16px` | `24px` | `24px` | `24px` |
| Page margin | `16px` | `24px` | `24px` | `auto` (centred, max `1280px`) |
| FilterBar layout | Stacked (search above chips) | Inline (search + chips row) | Inline | Inline |
| FilterBar padding (v / h) | `12px / 16px` | `16px / 24px` | `16px / 24px` | `16px / 24px` |
| Card actions visibility | Always visible (below content) | Always visible (below content) | Hover/focus revealed | Hover/focus revealed |
| FAB offset | `16px / 16px` | `24px / 24px` | `24px / 24px` | `24px / 24px` |
| ContentArea bottom padding | `80px` | `80px` | `48px` | `48px` |
| TagChip row scrollbar | Hidden (`scrollbar-width: none`) | Hidden | Hidden | Hidden |
| Tag chip fade overlay | Visible | Visible | Visible | Visible |
| EmptyIllustration max-width | `200px` | `240px` | `240px` | `240px` |
| SearchBar width | `100%` | `100%` | `100%` | `max 640px` (optional) |

---

### 4.3 FilterBar Responsive Detail

**Mobile (`< 768px`) — Stacked:**
```css
.filter-bar {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 12px; /* spacing[3] */
  padding: 12px 16px; /* spacing[3] / spacing[4] */
}
```

**Tablet and Desktop (`≥ 768px`) — Inline:**
```css
.filter-bar {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 16px; /* spacing[4] */
  padding: 16px 24px; /* spacing[4] / spacing[5] */
}
.search-bar { flex: 0 0 280px; } /* fixed width anchor */
.tag-filter-row { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } /* fills remaining space */
```

---
